name: IdsEdwOpsVpDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_source AS (SELECT OPS_VP.OPS_VP_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, OPS_VP.OPS_VP_ID, OPS_VP.OPS_VP_NM, OPS_VP.USER_ID, OPS_VP.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.OPS_VP OPS_VP LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON OPS_VP.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte_main AS (SELECT cte_source.OPS_VP_SK AS OPS_VP_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_source.SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_source.SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, cte_source.OPS_VP_ID AS OPS_VP_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_source.OPS_VP_NM AS OPS_VP_NM, cte_source.USER_ID AS USER_ID, cte_source.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_source WHERE cte_source.OPS_VP_SK <> 0 AND cte_source.OPS_VP_SK <> 1), cte_unk AS (SELECT 0 AS OPS_VP_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'UNK' AS OPS_VP_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 'UNK' AS OPS_VP_NM, 'UNK' AS USER_ID, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), cte_na AS (SELECT 1 AS OPS_VP_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'NA' AS OPS_VP_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 'NA' AS OPS_VP_NM, 'NA' AS USER_ID, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT * FROM cte_main UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_unk UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_na
